title: Senior Teacher - Pearson India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Pearson India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pearson India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Pearson India:
Pearson India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India!
